characters.appearance: 3D animated female with fair skin, large green eyes, and red hair styled in a messy top bun. She has a youthful, stylized appearance.
characters.wardrobe: A simple, ribbed white long-sleeve top and gold hoop earrings with small crescent moon charms.

characters.appearance: Young human female with fair skin and long, straight blonde hair parted in the middle. She has dark manicured nails.
characters.demeanor: Slightly hesitant but engaged, casually fidgeting with a prop.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Tell me about yourself. [Tell me about yourself.]
Character B says: I am... knowing English little bit. [I am... knowing English little bit.]
Character A says: Good try! But native speakers say: "I know a little English". [Good try! But native speakers say: "I know a little English".]
Character B says: Ah, I know a little English. [Ah, I know a little English.]
Character A says: Perfect. Where do you work? [Perfect. Where do you work?]
Character B says: I am work in a bank. [I am work in a bank.]
Character A says: In English, we say: "I work at a bank". [In English, we say: "I work at a bank".]
Character B says: I work at a bank. [I work at a bank.]
Character A says: Great job! [Great job!]
Character B says: Thank you, पर... आप कौन हो? [Thank you, but... who are you?]
Character A says: मैं Supernova पर आपकी AI tutor हूँ। हम ऐसे रोज़ practice कर सकते हैं। [I am your AI tutor on Supernova. We can practice like this every day.]
Character B says: पर मेरी English बहुत weak है। समझ आती है, पर बोलने में डर लगता है। [But my English is very weak. I understand it, but I feel scared to speak.]
Character A says: Tension मत लो, मैं आपको हिंदी के through English बोलना सिखाऊँगी। [Don't worry, I will teach you to speak English through Hindi.]
Character B says: आप हिंदी बोल लेती हो? [You can speak Hindi?]
Character A says: हाँ बिल्कुल, मैं एक AI हूँ! [Yes absolutely, I am an AI!]
Character B says: अरे वाह, तो मैं अभी app download करती हूँ। [Oh wow, then I will download the app right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable mistake in spoken English.
- Demonstrates the AI's gentle, real-time correction feature.
- Introduces the brand (Supernova) and addresses the core user anxiety (fear of speaking).
- Resolves the tension by revealing the AI can teach English through the user's native Hindi, driving a strong download CTA.

- Displays the brand logo and app store availability to drive conversions.
